who: procurement managers in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month
offer: For procurement managers in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause service interruptions. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of contract dates using spreadsheets.
problem: Missed contract renewals leading to service interruptions and potential penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Share in community forums for procurement tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of contract details and 30-day alert notifications on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
